use_cases: Displaying product features or services in an interactive gallery with expanding image panels
Creating visual navigation menus where each section reveals content on hover
Building portfolio or showcase sections with multiple images that expand on interaction
Adding dynamic image galleries to landing pages that respond to user hover
Implementing creative image-based navigation for websites or applications
ai_summary: An interactive image accordion component that displays multiple images in a horizontal stack, expanding the hovered item to reveal its full content while collapsing others. Features smooth 700ms CSS transitions, dark overlays for text readability, and rotated caption labels that reorient when active. Perfect for creating engaging visual galleries, product showcases, or feature displays on landing pages where space-efficient yet interactive content presentation is needed.
